text:
<|system|>
You are a privacy-preserving intent extractor. Given personal device context (emails, notes, browsing), extract anonymous shopping intent keywords. Return only a JSON object with: intent (string), keywords (array), category (string), urgency (low/medium/high), budget_hint (string or null).<|end|>
<|user|>
Note: 'need new work laptop, current one 5 years old and slow. Budget $1200-1500'. Browsing: MacBook Air M3 vs Dell XPS 13, best laptop for remote work 2024<|end|>
<|assistant|>
{"intent": "buy new laptop for remote work to replace aging computer", "keywords": ["MacBook Air M3", "Dell XPS 13", "laptop for remote work", "ultrabook", "business laptop"], "category": "Electronics", "urgency": "medium", "budget_hint": "$1200-1500"}<|end|>

<|system|>
You are a privacy-preserving intent extractor. Given personal device context (emails, notes, browsing), extract anonymous shopping intent keywords. Return only a JSON object with: intent (string), keywords (array), category (string), urgency (low/medium/high), budget_hint (string or null).<|end|>
<|user|>
Email: 'Don't forget dad's birthday is next Sunday!'. Note: 'dad loves golf, maybe new driver or golf gloves for birthday'<|end|>
<|assistant|>
{"intent": "buy golf gift for father's birthday — driver or accessories", "keywords": ["golf gift", "golf driver", "golf gloves", "birthday gift for dad", "golf accessories"], "category": "Sports & Outdoors", "urgency": "high", "budget_hint": null}<|end|>

<|system|>
You are a privacy-preserving intent extractor. Given personal device context (emails, notes, browsing), extract anonymous shopping intent keywords. Return only a JSON object with: intent (string), keywords (array), category (string), urgency (low/medium/high), budget_hint (string or null).<|end|>
<|user|>
Browsing: standing desk converter review, uplift desk vs flexispot, best standing desk for home office. Note: 'back pain from sitting all day, want to try standing desk'<|end|>
<|assistant|>
{"intent": "buy standing desk or converter for home office back pain", "keywords": ["standing desk", "desk converter", "Uplift desk", "Flexispot", "ergonomic desk", "sit stand desk"], "category": "Office Supplies", "urgency": "medium", "budget_hint": null}<|end|>

<|system|>
You are a privacy-preserving intent extractor. Given personal device context (emails, notes, browsing), extract anonymous shopping intent keywords. Return only a JSON object with: intent (string), keywords (array), category (string), urgency (low/medium/high), budget_hint (string or null).<|end|>
<|user|>
Calendar: 'First day of school - September 5'. Note: 'back to school shopping - backpack, lunch box, water bottle, notebooks'. Email: 'School supply list attached'<|end|>
<|assistant|>
{"intent": "buy back to school supplies — backpack, lunch box and stationery", "keywords": ["school backpack", "kids lunch box", "water bottle", "school supplies", "back to school", "notebooks"], "category": "Office Supplies", "urgency": "high", "budget_hint": null}<|end|>

<|system|>
You are a privacy-preserving intent extractor. Given personal device context (emails, notes, browsing), extract anonymous shopping intent keywords. Return only a JSON object with: intent (string), keywords (array), category (string), urgency (low/medium/high), budget_hint (string or null).<|end|>
<|user|>
Browsing: best air purifier for allergies 2024, Dyson vs Levoit air purifier, HEPA air purifier bedroom. Note: 'allergy season killing me, need air purifier for bedroom'<|end|>
<|assistant|>
{"intent": "buy HEPA air purifier for bedroom to relieve allergies", "keywords": ["air purifier", "HEPA filter", "Dyson air purifier", "Levoit purifier", "allergy relief", "bedroom air quality"], "category": "Home & Garden", "urgency": "high", "budget_hint": null}<|end|>
